notes: conversation_details_panel.rs:82,84 - access-denied title + description consts rendered in shared-session panel; regular UI text. main_page.rs - IapCredentialsWidget renders status_text/label/button to the settings UI: 'Not yet loaded','Refreshing…','Failed: {message}','Loaded (refreshes in ~{mins}m)','Staging IAP credentials','Using injected token (WARP_IAP_TOKEN)','Refresh' all translated; placeholders {message}/{mins} preserved, WARP_IAP_TOKEN env-var name preserved, '…' kept as Chinese ellipsis '……'. main_page.rs:1088 search_terms() keyword string -> bilingual append (iap/gcloud kept as technical terms, no Chinese duplicate). installation_modal.rs:83 'valid keystroke' is .expect() -> panic_message. channel/state.rs:291 'Server root URL should be valid' is .expect() -> panic_message. auth/mod.rs:249,523 are anyhow .context() error-chain strings (developer/log-facing diagnostics, not UI render) -> telemetry_payload.
